day5_lunch_start.name: 私
day5_lunch_start.text: *昼のチャイムが鳴った。今だ。*

day5_lunch_start_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_2.text: *鞄を持った。証拠は全部ポケットに。心臓が狂ったように鳴っている。*

day5_lunch_start_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_3.text: *I stood up before Sea could say 'let's eat together.'*

day5_lunch_start_5.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_5.text: *I didn't look at Sea. I was afraid I'd stop if I did.*

day5_lunch_start_6.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_6.text: *Left the classroom. The corridor. Turn left. Toward the old building.*

day5_lunch_start_7.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_7.text: *I walk. I want to run but I have to walk. Running draws attention. I gripped the bag strap tight. My palms are sweating.*

day5_lunch_start_8.name: 私
day5_lunch_start_8.text: *The corridor is long. Endlessly long. I can see the connecting passage toward the old building. I looked back. Nobody there. ...Not yet.*

day5_lunch_branch.name: 私
day5_lunch_branch.text: *ユナが教えてくれた場所。旧館3階。*

day5_lunch_yuna_2.name: チェ・ユナ
day5_lunch_yuna_2.text: 「旧館3階の突き当たりに非常口があるの。外に通じる唯一の道よ。」

day5_lunch_yuna_3.name: チェ・ユナ
day5_lunch_yuna_3.text: 「でも……その廊下を通らなきゃいけない。きっと誰かが見張ってるはず。」

day5_lunch_yuna_4.name: 私
day5_lunch_yuna_4.text: *ユナと目を合わせた。準備はできた。*

day5_lunch_yuna_7.name: チェ・ユナ
day5_lunch_yuna_7.text: "There's an emergency exit at the end of the 3rd floor of the old building. It's a route Seolhwa-sunbae... found one year ago. She told me in a dream."

day5_lunch_yuna_9.name: チェ・ユナ
day5_lunch_yuna_9.text: "But... we have to get through that corridor. Someone will be guarding it. ...Probably."

day5_lunch_yuna_11.name: 私
day5_lunch_yuna_11.text: *Yuna nods. She bites her lip hard. She's scared. But she moves.*

day5_lunch_yuna_12.name: 私
day5_lunch_yuna_12.text: *We started up the stairs. 1st floor. 2nd floor. 3rd floor.*

day5_lunch_solo.name: 私
day5_lunch_solo.text: *廊下を歩く。どこへ行けばいい？ 出口を……見つけなければ。*

day5_lunch_solo_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_solo_2.text: *旧館の方へ向かう。あっちに非常口がありそうだ。*

day5_lunch_escape_start.name: 私
day5_lunch_escape_start.text: *廊下を走り始めた。後ろから足音が聞こえる。*

day5_lunch_escape_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_escape_3.text: *Footsteps from behind. Click. Click. Shoe heels. Not just one pair. Several.*

day5_lunch_escape_5.name: 私
day5_lunch_escape_5.text: *I run. I started running down the corridor. Sneakers slap the tile. Tap-tap-tap-tap. My bag rattles against my back.*

day5_lunch_escape_6.name: 私
day5_lunch_escape_6.text: *A fork in the path. The corridor splits into a T-junction.*

day5_lunch_left_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_left_2.text: *...She was in the classroom until just a moment ago. How did she get here?*

day5_lunch_sea_talk_1c.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_talk_1c.text: *Sea's voice is cold. This isn't the bright voice from Day 1.*

day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.text: 「あの時、チョコミルク好きだって笑ってくれたのに。私に…嘘ついたの？」

day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.text: 「毎日お弁当作ったのに…全部、何でもなかったの？」

day5_lunch_sea_cb_vulnerability.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_cb_vulnerability.text: "In the student council room at sunset... you nodded when I said I wanted you to stay by my side."

day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.text: 「…同じクラスだったのに。それだけでも…十分だったのに。」

day5_lunch_sea_tears.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_tears.text: *Tears fall from Sea's eyes. Real tears. This isn't an act.*

day5_lunch_sea_tears_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_tears_2.text: *...My chest aches. I know Sea is a victim too. Another bird trapped in this school.*

day5_lunch_sea_pass.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_pass.text: *セアが廊下に立っている。...しかし道を塞いでいない。ぼんやりと私を見つめている。*

day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.text: *セアが私の腕を掴んだ。手に力が込められている。*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_block_max.text: *『カチャッ。』セアが後ろで教室のドアに鍵をかけた。...ここから出られない。*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.text: 「私だけ見てればいい。私だけ見てればいいの。...分かったよね、{name}？」

day5_lunch_sea_push.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_push.text: *セアを押しのけて走った。後ろから泣き声が聞こえる。*

day5_lunch_sea_push_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_push_2.text: *From behind, I hear Sea crying. I didn't look back. If I look back, I'll stop.*

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_3.text: "You're trapped here too. By Ms. Eunsu. By this school."

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_4.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_4.text: "...There's nothing for me outside. This is all I know."

day5_lunch_sea_persuade_9.name: 私
day5_lunch_sea_persuade_9.text: *"...Don't look back." Sea's final words echo down the corridor. I started running. I didn't look back.*

day5_lunch_escape_right.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_escape_right.text: 「あら、こんなところで会うなんて。{name}、まだ健康診断が終わってないのに。」

day5_lunch_right_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_right_2.text: *In the middle of the corridor, Nurse Riin is standing. White coat. One hand in her pocket.*

day5_lunch_riin_talk_1b.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_talk_1b.text: *The teacher takes her hand out of her pocket. She's holding a syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.text: 「あの時、お茶おいしいって言ったよね。先生が心を込めて作ったのに…もう一杯飲む？」

day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink_3.text: *Nurse Riin's hand is trembling. The hand holding the syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.text: 「初日から保健室に来てくれた時、先生本当に嬉しかったんだよ。…知ってた？」

day5_lunch_riin_cb_met_2.name: カン・リイン
day5_lunch_riin_cb_met_2.text: "...Did you know? You were the first student like you I'd ever had."

day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.text: "最後の検診だよ。採血一回で終わり。力抜いて～"

day5_lunch_riin_cb_default_2.name: カン・リイン
day5_lunch_riin_cb_default_2.text: "...No student who got an injection from me ever said it hurt."

day5_lunch_riin_block.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_riin_block.text: "最後の検診よ。採血を一本したら……楽になるわよ。"

day5_lunch_riin_block_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_block_2.text: *リインが注射器を持っている。*

day5_lunch_riin_dodge.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_dodge.text: *リインをかわして走った。注射器が壁にぶつかって割れた。*

day5_lunch_riin_dodge_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_dodge_3.text: *From behind, I heard the sound of glass breaking. She must have dropped the syringe.*

day5_lunch_riin_confront_2.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_riin_confront_2.text: 「……行きなさい。私も……もう疲れたわ。」

day5_lunch_riin_confront_3.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_confront_3.text: *The teacher lets out a breath. A long, deep exhale. As if something is draining from her body.*

day5_lunch_riin_confront_4.name: カン・リイン
day5_lunch_riin_confront_4.text: "...I refused at first too. When the board of directors ordered me."

day5_lunch_riin_confront_5.name: カン・リイン
day5_lunch_riin_confront_5.text: "But once you start... you can't stop."

day5_lunch_riin_confront_7.name: 私
day5_lunch_riin_confront_7.text: *Nurse Riin sets the syringe down on the floor. The glass makes a tap sound against the tile. She leans back against the wall and sits down. Eyes closed. I ran. Past Nurse Riin. Toward the emergency exit.*

day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.name: ハン・セア
day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.text: 「捕まえた。……もうどこにも行かないよね？」

day5_lunch_escape_caught_riin.name: 保健教師
day5_lunch_escape_caught_riin.text: "しっ。大丈夫よ。先生が痛くしないから。"

day5_lunch_continue.name: 私
day5_lunch_continue.text: *階段を上る。非常口が見える。もう少しだ！*

day5_lunch_continue_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_continue_2.text: *……ウンス先生が非常口の前に立っている。*

day5_lunch_continue_4.name: 私
day5_lunch_continue_4.text: *Ms. Eunsu is standing in front of the emergency exit. Arms crossed. She was waiting. As if she had been here from the very start.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_face_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_face_2.text: *The teacher looks at me. Sad eyes.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.text: 「アプリ設定してあげた時、ありがとうって言ったよね？…あの時、いい生徒だなって思ったんだけど。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app_2.name: パク・ウンス
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app_2.text: "...I thought what a good student you were then. I meant it."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.text: 「初日の放課後にわざわざ挨拶に来てくれたよね。あの時から…先生は君が特別だと思ったんだ。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit_2.name: パク・ウンス
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit_2.text: "From that moment... your teacher felt you were special. You were different from other transfer students."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.text: 「先生はあなたのためにこれを全部やったのに。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea.text: *Wrinkles form around Ms. Eunsu's eyes. A tired face. She looks like she hasn't slept.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_3.name: パク・ウンス
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_3.text: "Outside... nobody will think about you this much."

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_4.name: パク・ウンス
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_4.text: "You're safe here. Your teacher will protect you from everything."

day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_5.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_plea_5.text: *The teacher's voice trembles. ...She's sincere. This person, twisted as she is, genuinely believes she's 'protecting.' ...But does she not know that her 'protection' is a prison? Or does she know and still can't stop?*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.text: 「{name}。先生がどれだけ心配したか分かる？ ...もう戻ってこよう。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.text: 「先生の言うこと聞かないの？ ...{name}はいい子じゃない。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.text: *非常口に鍵がかかっている。...開かない。*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.name: 担任教師
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.text: 「どこに行こうとしてるの？ ...先生が全部準備しておいたから。{name}はここにいればいいの。」

day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.text: *突然、廊下の奥から火災報知器が鳴る。...ユナだ！ ウンス先生の視線がそちらに向いた瞬間、走った。*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_break.text: *ウンス先生を通り過ぎて非常口を開けた。冷たい風が顔を打つ。*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_2.text: *I pushed the emergency exit. A heavy door. I put my whole body into it.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_4.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_4.text: *Cold air slaps my face. It's raining. Raindrops hit my face.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break_5.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_break_5.text: *Beyond the emergency exit, there's light. A cloudy sky, but... the light of the outside world.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_2.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_2.text: *ウンス先生が僕の手を握った。……もう戻れない。*

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_3.name: パク・ウンス
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_3.text: "This is right. Your teacher will protect you from everything."

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_4.name: 私
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_4.text: *Ms. Eunsu took my hand. A warm hand. A large hand. A hand that gently envelops. ...There's no going back. The moment I took this hand.*

day5_lunch_breakthrough.name: 私
day5_lunch_breakthrough.text: *非常口の向こうに光が見える。出口だ。*
